description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with a rounded top, reminiscent of a vintage or rustic display case. The front and sides feature four open shelves, each separated by horizontal wooden slats, allowing for the display or storage of items. The wood has a dark, weathered finish, giving it a robust and aged appearance, while the shelves themselves appear to be made of a darker material, possibly tinted glass or painted wood. The back panel is solid and unadorned, providing structural support and stability. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, shops, or garages. The absence of doors or handles suggests easy access to the contents placed on the shelves.
description: A tall, narrow, rustic wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and a rounded top, finished in a dark, weathered wood. The design is open-fronted, with no doors or handles, making it ideal for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open shelving with four visible shelves and a rounded top, highlighting the dark wood finish and open access.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the depth of the shelves and the curvature of the top, emphasizing the narrow profile and the open structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid wooden back panel with a weathered texture, lacking any openings or shelves.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the same narrow profile, rounded top, and open shelving.
